title: Survive in the Winter Frontier
description: A mod for modpack "The Winter Frontier" about surviving in the extreme situation.
body:
# Abstract
The zombie hordes is comming. Protect your pets, put on the armor, grab your weapon and fight to the end!

# Add-ons
This mod adds various zombie animals for [The Hordes](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-hordes), and also a vaccine against infection to protect yourself and your pets.

Some electronic devices such as night vision device, accumulators, and especially wayfarer armors are added. You can charge them by using alternators in [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition).

How about guns in TaC? You can store bullets and reload it in your traveler's backpack (added from [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack)) now - so when you are in trouble, you do not have to open your backpack and put them out to reload. But you need to make a "traveler's backpack tac slot" first and upgrade your backpack.

# Other Features
This mod adds some scary decoration blocks such as fresh and blood block, infected dirt, blood fluid, for decorating modpack structures.

Goats and cows can no longer produce milk at any time. After you get milk bucket from one, it will be in cool down state for one minute (can be configurated), during which you can not get another bucket of milk from it.

Animals with tag #misc_twf:pooping_animals can poop and produce manure.

This mod is made for modpack The Winter Frontier.
